title: cleistogenes squarrosa
intro: Cleistogenes squarrosa, also known as Chinese spring wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cleistogenes squarrosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of juice or capsules, which can be consumed fresh or dried, and is also used in teas and infusions.
